name: googlecloud-plugin
description: A full Google Cloud delivery team for your coding agent: solution designer, GCP architect, agentic-systems architect (ADK / Agent Runtime / MCP / A2A / AP2), plus security, SRE, and QA — wired into a design-first, security-first delivery gate, with eleven service skills and MCP server setup.
skillInstructions:
Kimi Code tool mapping for this plugin's skills:

- When a skill says to ask the user or present multiple-choice options, call Kimi Code's `AskUserQuestion` tool.
- When a skill refers to `TodoWrite`, use Kimi Code's `TodoList` tool.
- When a skill dispatches an implementer/reviewer subagent, use Kimi Code's `Agent` tool (`coder`, `explore`, or `plan`).
- When a skill refers to the `Skill` tool, use Kimi Code's native `Skill` tool.
- Use Kimi Code's `Read`, `Write`, `Edit`, `Bash`, `Grep`, `Glob`, `FetchURL`, and `WebSearch` tools by their actual exposed names.
- Gate discipline is non-negotiable: design before code (solution-designer -> gcp-architect/agent-architect), security review before implementation (gcp-security), and `make gate` before any release (gcp-qa).

interface.shortDescription: A full Google Cloud delivery team for your coding agent.
interface.longDescription: Install once and gain a vendor-objective solution designer, a GCP architect, an agentic-systems architect (ADK / A2A / AP2 / MCP), plus security, SRE, and QA — wired into a design-first, security-first delivery gate. Eleven service skills, MCP setup, and a self-validating research pipeline.
